talking_to_camera_confident.prompt: talking confidently to camera, gesturing naturally with hands

pointing_at_screen.prompt: pointing at computer screen or display, explaining

walking_explaining.prompt: walking through space while explaining, looking at camera occasionally

demonstrating.prompt: demonstrating product or process, showing how something works

showing_product.prompt: holding and showing product to camera, rotating it, highlighting features

working_at_desk.prompt: working at desk, typing, looking at monitor, professional office work

reacting.prompt: reacting with facial expressions, showing surprise or satisfaction

walking_through_space.prompt: walking purposefully through space, confident stride, business walk

entering_room.prompt: entering room or space, opening door, stepping inside

typing.prompt: typing on keyboard, focused on work, professional

touring.prompt: giving tour of facility or workspace, gesturing at surroundings
